data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. A whale, after 2.5 months of inactivity, opened a 20x leveraged long position in gold and silver, totaling $11.5 million; 2. IEA warns: European aviation fuel stocks are only enough for 6 weeks, some flights are about to be canceled; 3. Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust sees net inflows of over $103 million; 4. Shipping data: Most ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz use Iran's forced routes; 5. Abraxas Capital deposits $148 million in BTC into Kraken, still holding $1.51 billion in BTC; 6. Visa's crypto head: Two US banks are now using USDC for trading on Solana; 7. Julius Baer: Despite ongoing Middle East tensions, oil prices may have peaked; 8. Machi Dage's ETH long position becomes Hyperliquid's TOP2, with a total unrealized profit of $1.599 million; 9. Market news: Anthropic plans to grant UK banks access to "Mythos" next week; 10. Exchange Traded Concepts, with assets of $21.7 billion, increased its holdings of MSTR by 19,900 shares, bringing its total holdings to 262,000 shares; 11. A senior Iranian official said that after a visit by Pakistani military officials, there is greater hope for extending the US-Iran ceasefire and holding a second round of negotiations; 12. ORDI continued to rise, breaking through 5 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 104%.

data.title: Swedish Central Bank Deputy Governor: Spillover Risk Lower Than 2022 Inflation Levels
data.description: Swedish Central Bank Deputy Governor Jansson has stated that the current risk of spillover effects is lower than the levels observed when inflation began to rise in 2022. According to Jin10, Jansson emphasized that the economic conditions have improved, reducing the likelihood of significant spillover impacts. He noted that the central bank is closely monitoring the situation to ensure stability in the financial markets. Jansson's comments reflect a cautious optimism about the current economic environment compared to the challenges faced in 2022.

data.title: NASA Faces Challenges and Opportunities with Lunar Landers from SpaceX and Blue Origin
data.description: NASA's decision to utilize lunar landers developed by SpaceX and Blue Origin presents both challenges and opportunities for the agency. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the reliance on these unproven technologies as a significant factor in NASA's lunar exploration strategy. The collaboration with these private companies marks a shift in how NASA approaches space missions, potentially accelerating advancements while also introducing risks associated with untested systems. As the agency moves forward, the balance between innovation and reliability will be crucial in achieving successful lunar missions.

data.title: U.S. Oil Companies Face Uncertainty Amid Trump's Policies on Iran and Venezuela
data.description: U.S. oil companies are grappling with uncertainty as U.S. President Donald Trump's policies regarding Iran and Venezuela could lead to a high-risk era for the industry. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by these companies in navigating the geopolitical landscape. The administration's stance on Iran and Venezuela has created a complex environment, leaving many oil firms unsure of their roles and strategies moving forward. As tensions rise, the industry is closely monitoring developments to assess potential impacts on operations and market dynamics.

data.title: Crypto Industry Trends and Predictions for 2026 Q1 Released by TruthX and Animoca Brands
data.description:
On April 16, TruthX, in collaboration with Animoca Brands, released the '2026 Q1 Top 220 KOL Report: Summary and Predictions of Crypto Industry Trends.' According to BlockBeats, the report highlights significant volatility in the crypto market during the first quarter of 2026, driven by geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainties. Traditional high-valuation narratives are rapidly declining, while new directions such as AI infrastructure and Real World Assets (RWA) are gaining momentum.

The rapid shifts and intense fluctuations in the market, coupled with information overload, make trend assessment challenging. The collective insights of the top 220 global crypto Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs) serve as a crucial reference for understanding industry dynamics. TruthX has conducted structured data analysis on their content, providing forward-looking predictions on subsequent trends, opportunity windows, and risk points.

This report aims to help users quickly rebuild trend frameworks in a volatile market and seize opportunities in the next phase.

data.title: IEA warns: European aviation fuel stocks only last for 6 weeks, some flights may be cancelled.
data.description: According to the Associated Press, International Energy Agency (IEA) Executive Director Fatih Birol said in an interview on Thursday that Europe's aviation fuel supply "may only last about six weeks," and warned that flight cancellations could "soon" occur if oil supplies continue to be disrupted due to the war with Iran. He called the Strait of Hormuz crisis "the biggest energy crisis in history." Birol said, "There used to be a band called 'Terror Strait.' Now it's a real 'Terror Strait,' which will have a significant impact on the global economy. The longer this situation lasts, the greater the negative impact on global economic growth and inflation." Birol stated that this will drive up gasoline, natural gas, and electricity prices, with countries reliant on Middle Eastern energy sources, including Japan, South Korea, India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh, bearing the brunt, before spreading to Europe and the United States. If the strait does not reopen, some European flights may be canceled due to fuel shortages.

data.title: Bitget has launched USD-margined GENIUS perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-based GENIUS perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x. Contract trading bots will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: JustLend DAO completes its third JST buyback and destruction.
data.description: According to the official announcement, JustLend DAO officially completed its third JST token buyback and burn today, burning a total of 271,337,579 JST tokens, corresponding to a value of approximately $21.3 million. The tokens have been transferred to the black hole address. The funds for this burn came from the protocol's net proceeds in the first quarter of 2026 and past accumulated proceeds. As of April 16, 2026, the cumulative number of JST tokens burned has reached 1,356,228,332, accounting for 13.70% of the total supply. JustLend DAO will continue to perform buybacks and burns quarterly and will regularly and transparently disclose progress to the community to jointly promote value creation.

data.title: Shipping data: Most ships passing through Hormuz use the route mandated by Iran.
data.description: Data from shipping analysis firm Lloyd's Register shows that most cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz recently used routes mandated by Iran to hug the coastline, part of Iran's plan to control the waterway. Since April 13, approximately 15 of the 27 large merchant ships tracked by Lloyd's have used this route; no ships used non-Iranian routes. Other vessels travel to and from the Iranian port of Bandar Abbas, which sits directly on the strait. The data also shows that 81% of ships transiting the strait since April have connections to Iran. The US-sanctioned oil tanker RHN entered the Persian Gulf on Wednesday and was still sailing near the Iranian coast on Thursday, with no destination listed. Lloyd's analysts stated, "Ships are still transiting daily, most of them connected to Iran." (Jinshi)

data.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust saw net inflows exceeding $103 million.
data.description: Cointelegraph reported on its X platform that Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin Trust saw a net inflow of over $103 million in just six trading days after its launch, surpassing the net inflow of WisdomTree's Bitcoin Fund.

data.title: Abraxas Capital deposited $148 million worth of BTC into Kraken, maintaining its total BTC holdings at $1.51 billion.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Abraxas Capital (Alpha Bitcoin Fund) has just deposited 1,993 BTC into Kraken, worth $148 million. Since March 14, Abraxas Capital (Alpha Bitcoin Fund) has cumulatively deposited 9,582 BTC into Kraken, worth $691 million, and currently still holds 20,337 BTC, worth $1.51 billion.

data.title: Binance Futures to Launch MSFT, AVGO, BABA USDT-Margined Perpetuals on April 20
data.description: Binance Futures will launch three new USDT-margined perpetual contracts on April 20, according to a Binance Announcement. MSFTUSDT, tracking Microsoft Corporation (Nasdaq: MSFT), goes live at 13:30 UTC; AVGOUSDT, tracking Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO), at 13:40 UTC; and BABAUSDT, tracking Alibaba Group Holdings Ltd ADR (NYSE: BABA), at 13:50 UTC. Each contract offers maximum 10x leverage, settles in USDT, carries a capped funding rate of ±2% per eight-hour interval, trades 24/7, and supports multi-assets mode.

data.title: HIVE Digital Technologies Announces $75 Million Private Placement for Expansion
data.description:
HIVE Digital Technologies, a publicly listed Bitcoin mining company, has announced a private placement of $75 million in 0% exchangeable senior notes due in 2031. According to Foresight News, the funds will be used for GPU procurement, data center expansion, and general corporate purposes. The company has also received conditional approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange, with expectations to transition its stock from the TSX Venture Exchange to the TSX Exchange around April 30.

In addition, HIVE is shifting part of its operations towards high-performance computing and artificial intelligence workloads. In March, the company revealed plans to gradually cease ASIC-based Bitcoin mining activities at its facility in Boden, Sweden, due to a tax dispute with the local government. The facility will be upgraded to a Tier 3 high-performance computing data center to support GPU clusters.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Investment Yields Significant Returns
data.description: A cryptocurrency address has achieved substantial gains through strategic investments, according to Foresight News. The address, beginning with 7Be6hv, initially spent 0.1 SOL, equivalent to $8.5, to purchase 6,636 BELIEF tokens and subsequently staked them. As a result of staking, the address received 25.06 SOL, valued at $2,160, and 2.9 million BELIEF tokens, currently worth $7,768, as staking rewards. This strategic move transformed an initial investment of $8.5 into approximately $9,928, marking a return rate of 1,169 times the original investment.

data.title: A trader turned $8.50 into $9,928, a return of 1,169 times.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader 7Be6hv spent 0.1 SOL ($8.5) to buy 6636 BELIEF and staked it, receiving 25.06 SOL ($2160) and 2.9 million BELIEF (current value $7768) in staking rewards.

data.title: Bitcoin Developers Propose Upgrade to Address Quantum Vulnerabilities
data.description: Six Bitcoin developers and quantum experts have put forward a proposal for a Bitcoin upgrade aimed at addressing vulnerabilities in wallets susceptible to quantum attacks. According to NS3.AI, the proposed upgrade includes a three-year migration period, after which the network would begin rejecting transactions that depend on quantum-vulnerable cryptography. This move could potentially impact approximately $81 billion in Bitcoin, including those associated with Satoshi Nakamoto.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with HOOD up 2.61%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with CRCL up 2.5%; COIN up 0.69%; MSTR down 0.21%, SBET down 0.92%, and HOOD up 2.61%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 620 USDT with a Narrowed 0.30% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 16, 2026, 10:13 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 620 USDT and is now trading at 619.830017 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.30% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Protocols Lack Transparency in Market-Making Arrangements, Report Finds
data.description:
Cryptocurrency consulting firm Novora has released its 2026 Investor Relations and Token Transparency Report, highlighting significant gaps in the disclosure of market-making arrangements among major crypto protocols. According to Foresight News, the report reviewed over 150 key crypto protocols and found that while market-making plays a crucial role in token trading, disclosures related to these arrangements are almost nonexistent. Less than 1% of the protocols disclosed terms related to market makers. Notably, only one protocol, the decentralized liquidity platform Meteora, revealed details of its market-making arrangements in its 2025 token holder annual report.

Novora's findings indicate that 91% of the reviewed protocols generated traceable revenue, yet only 18% provided quarterly updates, and a mere 8% issued token holder reports. This suggests that while relevant data exists, it is rarely integrated into structured investor communication channels.

The study encompassed decentralized exchanges, lending platforms, perpetual futures, Layer-1 and Layer-2 networks, cross-chain bridges, and centralized exchange tokens, with protocol valuations ranging from approximately $40 million to $45 billion.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Decline in Early 2026
data.description:
The total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies fell by 20.4% to $2.4 trillion in the first quarter of 2026, marking a 45% decline from the peak in October 2025. According to PANews, the stablecoin market capitalization remained steady at $309.9 billion during the same period. Notably, Tether's USDT issuance saw a significant decrease of 1.6% to $184.1 billion, marking its first notable decline since the second quarter of 2022, while Circle's USDC increased by 2.4% to $77.1 billion.

Bitcoin's price dropped by 22% over the quarter, underperforming major U.S. stock indices. Centralized exchange spot trading volumes decreased by 39.1% to $2.7 trillion. In decentralized trading, Solana maintained its leading position with a 30.6% market share. Hyperliquid's perpetual contracts accounted for approximately 30% of the overall open interest, with its 24/7 oil contract trading volume temporarily surpassing expectations.
